title: Algebra Essentials
description: A GCSE-grade algebra refresher covering simplifying expressions, expanding and factorising brackets, solving linear equations, rearranging formulae, and the laws of indices.
objectives: Simplify algebraic expressions by collecting like terms
Expand single brackets and pairs of brackets such as (x+2)(x+3)
Factorise expressions using a common factor and simple quadratics by inspection
Solve linear equations, including those with brackets and unknowns on both sides
Rearrange a formula to change the subject
Apply the laws of indices for multiplying, dividing, and raising powers, including zero and negative indices

lessons.title: Solving Linear Equations and Rearranging Formulae
